extra.reason: Fixed in feat/v1-visual-spike: main.go now builds an http.Server with ReadHeaderTimeout/ReadTimeout/WriteTimeout/IdleTimeout instead of http.ListenAndServe. Resolves gosec G114.

Classify bd errors by kind: ErrNotFound->404, ErrInvalidArg->400, ErrBD->502, unclassified->500. Added classify() in internal/bd + statusForError() in server. Tests both layers.
superseded by strand-2bd / PR #5: statusForError maps ErrNotFound->404, ErrInvalidArg->400, ErrBD->502, unclassified->500. Acceptance criteria met.

in-process bead-graph metrics lib shipped: internal/graph (gonum — PageRank/betweenness/HITS/Tarjan cycles/longest-path critical path, pure + fixture-tested) + bd.Deps edge-fetch + IssueSource.Deps seam. make check green; live pipeline verified against strand's own beads.

V4 insights/stats view shipped: 6-panel dashboard (triage/PageRank/betweenness/critical-path/cycles/label-health) over in-process gonum metrics, 4th scope view. 11 tests + make audit green. PR #11. Caveat: live /insights inherits pre-existing /graph Deps multi-id hang (strand-d6f), not a regression — view proven via httptest.

App-wide cross-site write guard shipped via PR https://github.com/dkoosis/strand/pull/12. One Sec-Fetch-Site/Origin check on ALL mutate routes (POST/PATCH/DELETE) via mutate() helper; GET reads never gated; no-header CLI requests allowed; rejections render error fragment at 403. make audit GREEN.
Merged via PR #12; gemini case-insensitive Origin fix accepted+applied
Merged PR #13: guard edgeless HITS + reviewer shadow-rename

V1 manual rank shipped in PR #14 (https://github.com/dkoosis/strand/pull/14). Server-authoritative bd-metadata rank, pure-rank-after-seed, 204-on-success. V1-list scope; V2 deferred → strand-45o. Audit trail: docs/superpowers/plans/strand-alg.4/.

Dropped Hub/Authority/Depth from graph.Metrics + deleted the network.HITS branch (and its edgeless zero-fill — the d6f guard goes with it); depths() keeps computing the critical path, its per-node map now discarded. Tests trimmed/retargeted. api-surface F1.

Named the write-callback contract: type writeFunc func(context.Context, IssueSource) (*bd.Issue, error), used at writeAndRefresh's signature beside SourceFunc. domain-vocab F1. solid F1 (ISP narrowing) left as the borderline both linters rated 'low-value to split fully'.

Verified bd's contract: list/show JSON always emits priority (0-4, default 2), so 0 = P0 unambiguously — no read-path absent-vs-zero hazard. Took zero-sentinel F1's sanctioned doc-the-guarantee path over *int (which would force pointer literals across 33 test fixtures + template derefs for a break bd can't make without breaking itself).

Promoted bead status to a named type owned by bd: type Status string + StatusOpen/InProgress/Blocked/Closed/Deferred. bd.Issue.Status, forest.Bead.Status, the statusLabel template func, and every server comparison now read those constants; forest's hand-spelled literals gone. change-smells F1.
